Module com.example.ventana
Package com.example.ventana.model

Interface IWord

All Known Implementing Classes:
Word
public interface IWord
The IWord interface defines the contract for word management within the game. Implementations of this interface are responsible for generating new words and providing access to the currently generated word.

Main responsibilities include:

  • Generating a new word when requested.
  • Returning the current word stored in memory.

This interface allows the game logic to remain independent of the specific word generation strategy, enabling flexibility and extensibility.

Author:
Nerie

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    generateWord()
    Generates a new word.
    String
    getCurrentWord()
    Returns the currently generated word.

  • Method Details

    • generateWord

      String generateWord()
      Generates a new word.

      Implementations should define how the word is selected, for example from a predefined list, a database, or dynamically based on the current game level.

      Returns:
      the newly generated word as a String.

    • getCurrentWord

      String getCurrentWord()
      Returns the currently generated word.
      Returns:
      the current word as a String.
